languages.text: "Миленько. Совсем не подозрительно, не так ли, шерин? Не хотелось бы вот так безрассудно ступать в явную ловушку, но, кажется, выбора у нас нет". {n}Джай окидывает окружающую беззвучную пустоту печальным взглядом и зябко пожимает плечами.{/n}

"Lovely. Not suspicious at all, is it, shereen? I'd hate to step into an obvious trap so recklessly, but it seems we have no choice." {n}Jae casts a sad look at the silent void and hunches her shoulders, shivering.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Миленько. Совсем не подозрительно, не так ли, шерин? Не хотелось бы вот так безрассудно ступать в явную ловушку, но, кажется, выбора у нас нет". {n}Джай окидывает окружающую беззвучную пустоту печальным взглядом и зябко пожимает плечами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lovely. Not suspicious at all, is it, shereen? I'd hate to step into an obvious trap so recklessly, but it seems we have no choice." {n}Jae casts a sad look at the silent void and hunches her shoulders, shivering.{/n}

"Lovely. Not suspicious at all, is it, shereen? I'd hate to step into an obvious trap so recklessly, but it seems we have no choice." {n}Jae casts a sad look at the silent void and hunches her shoulders, shivering.{/n}

"Lovely. Not suspicious at all, is it, shereen? I'd hate to step into an obvious trap so recklessly, but it seems we have no choice." {n}Jae casts a sad look at the silent void and hunches her shoulders, shivering.{/n}

languages.text: « Charmant... et pas suspect du tout, hein, shereen ? Je n'ai pas franchement envie de me jeter dans un piège aussi flagrant, mais j'ai bien peur que nous n'ayons pas le choix. » {n}Jae lance un regard triste au vide silencieux, puis rentre la tête dans les épaules en frissonnant.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lovely. Not suspicious at all, is it, shereen? I'd hate to step into an obvious trap so recklessly, but it seems we have no choice." {n}Jae casts a sad look at the silent void and hunches her shoulders, shivering.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Charmant... et pas suspect du tout, hein, shereen ? Je n'ai pas franchement envie de me jeter dans un piège aussi flagrant, mais j'ai bien peur que nous n'ayons pas le choix. » {n}Jae lance un regard triste au vide silencieux, puis rentre la tête dans les épaules en frissonnant.{/n}

languages.text: «Maravilloso. Esto es de lo más normal, ¿verdad, shereen? Detesto lanzarme de cabeza a una trampa tan obvia, pero no parece que tengamos otra elección». {n}Jae echa una mirada triste al silencioso vacío y se encorva con un estremecimiento.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lovely. Not suspicious at all, is it, shereen? I'd hate to step into an obvious trap so recklessly, but it seems we have no choice." {n}Jae casts a sad look at the silent void and hunches her shoulders, shivering.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Maravilloso. Esto es de lo más normal, ¿verdad, shereen? Detesto lanzarme de cabeza a una trampa tan obvia, pero no parece que tengamos otra elección». {n}Jae echa una mirada triste al silencioso vacío y se encorva con un estremecimiento.{/n}

languages.text: “真不错。一点都不可疑，是吧，亲爱的？我也不想这么莽撞地踏进明晃晃的陷阱，但看来我们别无选择。”{n}婕伊向沉寂的虚空投去忧郁的一瞥，瑟缩着耸起肩膀。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lovely. Not suspicious at all, is it, shereen? I'd hate to step into an obvious trap so recklessly, but it seems we have no choice." {n}Jae casts a sad look at the silent void and hunches her shoulders, shivering.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “真不错。一点都不可疑，是吧，亲爱的？我也不想这么莽撞地踏进明晃晃的陷阱，但看来我们别无选择。”{n}婕伊向沉寂的虚空投去忧郁的一瞥，瑟缩着耸起肩膀。{/n}

languages.text: "Wunderbar! Und überhaupt nicht verdächtig, nicht wahr, Shereen? Ich gehe nur ungern derart leichtsinnig in eine so offensichtliche Falle, aber anscheinend haben wir keine Wahl." {n}Jae wirft einen traurigen Blick auf die stumme Leere und zieht zitternd die Schultern hoch.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lovely. Not suspicious at all, is it, shereen? I'd hate to step into an obvious trap so recklessly, but it seems we have no choice." {n}Jae casts a sad look at the silent void and hunches her shoulders, shivering.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wunderbar! Und überhaupt nicht verdächtig, nicht wahr, Shereen? Ich gehe nur ungern derart leichtsinnig in eine so offensichtliche Falle, aber anscheinend haben wir keine Wahl." {n}Jae wirft einen traurigen Blick auf die stumme Leere und zieht zitternd die Schultern hoch.{/n}

languages.text: "Harika. Durum hiç şüphe çekmiyor ya şirinim... Apaçık bir tuzağa bu kadar pervasızca girmekten nefret ediyorum ama görünüşe göre başka seçeneğimiz yok." {n}Jae, suskun boşluğa hüzünlü bir bakış atıyor ve omuzlarını çökertip titriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lovely. Not suspicious at all, is it, shereen? I'd hate to step into an obvious trap so recklessly, but it seems we have no choice." {n}Jae casts a sad look at the silent void and hunches her shoulders, shivering.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Harika. Durum hiç şüphe çekmiyor ya şirinim... Apaçık bir tuzağa bu kadar pervasızca girmekten nefret ediyorum ama görünüşe göre başka seçeneğimiz yok." {n}Jae, suskun boşluğa hüzünlü bir bakış atıyor ve omuzlarını çökertip titriyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「素敵ですね。全く怪しいところはありませんね、シェリーン。明らかな罠に飛び込むなんて、とても嫌ですが、選択肢はないようです」{n}ジェイは沈黙の虚無を悲しそうに見つめ、肩をすくめて震えだす。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lovely. Not suspicious at all, is it, shereen? I'd hate to step into an obvious trap so recklessly, but it seems we have no choice." {n}Jae casts a sad look at the silent void and hunches her shoulders, shivering.{/n}
